import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v > t
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
